allow: Bash(python3 -c " import json,sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) for t in data.get\('tunnels', []\): print\('URL pública:', t['public_url']\) print\('Estado: ', t['status']\) ")
Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) content = data['content'][0]['text'] if data.get\('content'\) else str\(data\) print\(content[:5000]\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) files = data.get\('files', []\) for f in files: if 'bml' in f.get\('owner',''\).lower\(\) or 'cidesa' in f.get\('title',''\).lower\(\) or f.get\('mimeType',''\) in ['application/vnd.ms-excel','application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet','application/vnd.google-apps.spreadsheet']: print\(f['title'], '|', f['mimeType'], '|', f['id'], '|', f.get\('parentId',''\)\) ")
